caption: The video captures a formal event at the United States Institute of Peace, as indicated by the backdrop and podium signage. On stage, there are two men: one standing behind a podium on the left side, dressed in a casual blazer and jeans, and another seated in a chair on the right, wearing a suit and tie. The seated man appears to be engaged in conversation or an interview, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. The audience, visible in the foreground, is attentively watching the interaction. The setting suggests a professional discussion or presentation, possibly involving topics related to peace and international affairs. The atmosphere is serious and focused, with the participants and attendees actively involved in the exchange.
